understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level of the KA59 puzzle by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+'), with all goals occupied simultaneously to trigger a level win, ultimately winning the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifted the currently selected piece in a chosen direction on a 3-pixel-per-cell grid, with pushable objects sliding along when adjacent. Walls and boundaries blocked or interfered with movement in inconsistent ways that required experimentation. CLICK actions allowed switching control between different selectable pieces using their specific pixel coordinates, enabling sequencing of moves to place multiple pieces onto goals.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level of the KA59 puzzle by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+'), with all goals occupied simultaneously to trigger a level win, ultimately winning the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifted the currently selected piece in a chosen direction on a 3-pixel-per-cell grid, with pushable objects sliding along when adjacent. Walls and boundaries blocked or interfered with movement in inconsistent ways that required experimentation. CLICK actions allowed switching control between different selectable pieces using their specific pixel coordinates, enabling sequencing of moves to place multiple pieces onto goals.
